title: Improve search, sorting and display for connection using TAG
author: xufux
body_snippet:
<!-- Feature Request -->

<!-- If you file a feature request, please delete the bug section -->

What about adding a TAG field for connections ?

let me illustrate this 
- server01 tag= backup
- server02 tag=DC, DHCP
- server03 tag=DC, File
- server04 tag=DEV

Then in the related textbox, if i enter DC, the connection list will be refresh so that only server02 and 03 displayed.
if filtered with "DC, File" then only the server03 is visible

iterations.description: Tag-based search, sorting and display is a valid enhancement request for connection management, endorsed as candidate for 1.8 by maintainer

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage: Tag-based search, sorting and display is a valid enhancement request for connection management, endorsed as candidate for 1.8 by maintainer
Approach: Enhance the connection tree to support filtering/sorting by tags, add tag display column or badge in the tree view, and improve search to include tag matching
